---
title: "SSC Soil Moisture Protocol in France - Comparison between SSC and TALL - Final report"
author: "Naharajan Lakshmanaperumal, Senior Data Scientist, EMEA Agronomy"
date: "25.11.2025"
output:
  slidy_presentation: default
  beamer_presentation: default
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
  ioslides_presentation: default
  word_document:
    reference_docx: south_africa_variety_data_report_final.docx
always_allow_html: yes
---

# Contents

<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>


- Protocol Summary

- Raw data from Soil Moisture Protocol

- Data Consolidation from all locations and addition of new columns

- Exploratory data analysis 

    - Overall data summary
    
    - Visualization of time series data using the coefficient normalization method

- Statistical analysis
  


<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/restricted.PNG" width="100px" align="right"></div>


# SSC Soil Moisture Protocol - Comparison between SSC and TALL systems


<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>


- **Objective**: To compare the soil moisture & temperature levels at different soil depths between the two hybrid systems of interest - SSC 40cm VS Tall 80cm row spacing.


-SSC 40cm: **EZ5936XKPZ & Densité 3 : 120000 plt/ha & 40cm, 120000 plt/ha & 80cm narrow inter row spacing**    

-Tall 80cm: **DKC5182 & Densité - 85000 plt/ha & 80cm , 95000 plt/ha & 40cm conventional inter row spacing**  

# Raw data from Soil Moisture Protocol

- Raw data for 2 protocols in sharepoint site: https://bayergroup.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/sites/006212/Shared%20Documents/MA%C3%8FS/2023/SSC%20-%20SMART%20CORN%20-%20PRECECON/CORHIZE?csf=1&web=1&e=tajaki


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}


library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
#library(lmerTest)
#library(multcompView)
library(readxl)
library(plotly)
library(lubridate)
#library(dygraphs)

#install.packages("lmerTest")
#install.packages("multcompView")

#DT::datatable(head(start_flex,100), filter="top")

fichier = read_excel("/mnt/data/file_indication_probes_2025.xlsx")

names(fichier)[1] = "year"
names(fichier)[2] = "plot"
names(fichier)[3] = "trial"
names(fichier)[4] = "location"
names(fichier)[5] = "system"
names(fichier)[6] = "hybrid"
names(fichier)[7] = "hybrid_type"
names(fichier)[8] = "density"
names(fichier)[9] = "row_spacing_cm"
names(fichier)[10] = "file_name"
names(fichier)[11] = "planting_date"
names(fichier)[12] = "period_analysis"
names(fichier)[13] = "latitude"
names(fichier)[14] = "longitude"

fichier = fichier %>% unite(trial_plot, trial, plot, sep="__", remove=F)
fichier = fichier %>% separate(file_name, into=c("hybrid_type","hybrid_number","hybrid_rowspacing"),sep=" - ",remove=F)
fichier = fichier %>% unite(trial_system, trial, hybrid_rowspacing, sep="__", remove=F)

#SSC6 (100) 
#SSC7 (75)


planting_files <- list.files(path="/mnt/data/probes_data_2025/",pattern="*.xlsx", full.names=TRUE, recursive=TRUE)


planting_files_df = data.frame(full_file_name=planting_files)

planting_files_df = planting_files_df %>% separate(full_file_name, into=c("dir1","dir2","protocol","field","file_n","file_1","file_2"),sep="/",remove=F)

planting_files_df$dir1 = NULL
planting_files_df$file_n = NULL

planting_files_df = planting_files_df %>% mutate(trial = ifelse(file_1=="SSC6","SSC6 (100)",ifelse(file_1=="SSC7_75","SSC7 (75)",file_1)))

planting_files_df = planting_files_df %>% separate(file_2, into=c("hybrid_type","hybrid_number","hybrid_rowspacing"),sep=" - ",remove=F)

#planting_files_df = planting_files_df %>% unite(trial_plot, trial, plot, sep="__", remove=F)

planting_files_df = planting_files_df %>% unite(trial_system, trial, hybrid_rowspacing, sep="__", remove=F)

planting_files_df = planting_files_df %>% inner_join(fichier)

planting_points_data_all=data.frame()


for (i in 1:nrow(planting_files_df)){
 
  #print(planting_files_df[i])
  #load(files[i])
 
  #print(dim(t))
 c <- read_excel(planting_files_df$full_file_name[i],skip=2)
   start_flex=c
   
   #glimpse(loc_dataset)
   names(start_flex)[2] = "average_moisture"
names(start_flex)[3] = "soil_mois_1_10"
names(start_flex)[4] = "soil_mois_2_20"
names(start_flex)[5] = "soil_mois_3_30"
names(start_flex)[6] = "soil_mois_4_40"
names(start_flex)[7] = "soil_mois_5_50"
names(start_flex)[8] = "soil_mois_6_60"
names(start_flex)[9] = "rain_gauge"
names(start_flex)[10] = "soil_temp_1_10"
names(start_flex)[11] = "soil_temp_2_20"
names(start_flex)[12] = "soil_temp_3_30"
names(start_flex)[13] = "soil_temp_4_40"
names(start_flex)[14] = "soil_temp_5_50"
names(start_flex)[15] = "soil_temp_6_60"
start_flex$`Ambient Temperature`= NULL
start_flex$`Relative Humidity`= NULL
start_flex$location_name = planting_files_df$location[i]
start_flex$location = planting_files_df$location[i]
start_flex$hybrid = planting_files_df$hybrid[i]
start_flex$interrow_spacing = planting_files_df$row_spacing_cm[i]
start_flex$filename = planting_files_df$file_name[i]
start_flex$latitude = planting_files_df$latitude[i]
start_flex$longitude = planting_files_df$longitude[i]
start_flex$sowing_date = planting_files_df$planting_date[i]
#start_flex$harvest_date = planting_files_df$harvest_date[i]
start_flex$system = planting_files_df$system[i]
start_flex$density = planting_files_df$density[i]
start_flex$hybrid_type = planting_files_df$hybrid_type[i]
start_flex = filter(start_flex, !is.na(soil_mois_1_10))

     planting_points_data_all = bind_rows(planting_points_data_all, start_flex)

}


write_csv(planting_points_data_all,"/mnt/data/SSC_probes_trials_consolidated_data_2025_season.csv")

sondes_data = planting_points_data_all

sondes_data$rain_gauge= NULL

sondes_data_long = sondes_data %>% gather(trait,value,2:14)

unique(sondes_data_long$trait)
unique(sondes_data_long$system)


sondes_data_long = sondes_data_long %>% mutate(trait_type = ifelse(trait %in% c("average_moisture","soil_mois_1_10","soil_mois_2_20","soil_mois_3_30","soil_mois_4_40","soil_mois_5_50" , "soil_mois_6_60"),"capacity sensors","temperature"))

sondes_data_long$dat = as.Date(sondes_data_long$Date)

sondes_data_gather_summary_1 = sondes_data_long %>% group_by(location,system,trait,dat) %>% arrange(dat) %>%summarise(mean_value=mean(value))
sondes_data_gather_summary_1 = sondes_data_gather_summary_1 %>% unite(hybrid_factor_trait, location,system,trait, sep="__", remove=F)


sondes_data_gather_summary_2 = sondes_data_gather_summary_1 %>% group_by(hybrid_factor_trait) %>% arrange(dat) %>%  mutate(rank_day=row_number()) %>% filter(rank_day==1)

#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_2 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1 %>% group_by(trait) %>% mutate(max_or_min= ifelse(mean_value==max(mean_value), "max","not_max"),coefficient= mean_value/min(mean_value), final_coefficient= coefficient) %>% unite(hybrid_factor_trait, hybrid_factor,trait, sep="__", remove=F) 

sondes_data_gather_summary_2 = sondes_data_gather_summary_2 %>% group_by(location,trait) %>% mutate(max_or_min= ifelse(mean_value==max(mean_value), "max","min"),coefficient= max(mean_value)/mean_value, final_coefficient= ifelse(max_or_min=="min",coefficient,1)) %>% unite(hybrid_factor_trait, location,system,trait, sep="__", remove=F)

sondes_data_gather_summary_3 = sondes_data_gather_summary_2 %>% dplyr::select(hybrid_factor_trait,final_coefficient)

sondes_data_gather_summary_1 = merge(sondes_data_gather_summary_1,sondes_data_gather_summary_3,by="hybrid_factor_trait")

sondes_data_gather_summary_1 = sondes_data_gather_summary_1 %>% mutate(value_transformed= mean_value*final_coefficient)


```

# Exploratory data analysis - Data normalization using a coefficient method


- **Calculation of coefficient**:- Ratio of moisture level between maximum and all levels of moisture observed on the first day per location

- The coefficient calculated per trait based on the first shared day across all hybrids was then prapogated to the corresponsing values of that specific trait for the complete dataset  

![](/mnt/data/coefficient_method_ssc_1.jpg)


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
DT::datatable(sondes_data_gather_summary_1, filter="top")

```

# Capacity sensors data - Time series visualization

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=15, fig.width=15}

sondes_data_gather_summary_1 = sondes_data_gather_summary_1 %>% mutate(trait_type = ifelse(trait.x %in% c("average_moisture","soil_mois_1_10","soil_mois_2_20","soil_mois_3_30","soil_mois_4_40","soil_mois_5_50" , "soil_mois_6_60"),"capacity sensors","temperature"))



sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot = filter(sondes_data_gather_summary_1, trait_type=="capacity sensors")

#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, location.x == "SENESTIS")

unique(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot$trait.x)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot %>% unite(hybrid_trait,system, sep="__", remove=F)

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil moisture - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)


# sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot = filter(sondes_data_gather_summary_1, trait_type!="capacity sensors")
# 
# #sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, location.x == "SENESTIS")
# 
# unique(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot$trait.x)
# 
# sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot %>% unite(hybrid_trait, hybrid_type,system, sep="__", remove=F)
# 
# p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
#   geom_line() + 
#   xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil temperature - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~trait_type,scales="free_y")
# plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

# Soil temperature data - Time series visualization

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
sondes_data_gather_summary_1 = sondes_data_gather_summary_1 %>% mutate(trait_type = ifelse(trait.x %in% c("average_moisture","soil_mois_1_10","soil_mois_2_20","soil_mois_3_30","soil_mois_4_40","soil_mois_5_50" , "soil_mois_6_60"),"capacity sensors","temperature"))



sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_temp = filter(sondes_data_gather_summary_1, trait_type=="temperature")

#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, location.x == "SENESTIS")

unique(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_temp$trait.x)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_temp = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_temp %>% unite(hybrid_trait,system, sep="__", remove=F)

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_temp, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Temperature - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

```

# Periods of time to delta sum

**Request fron Gabrial Goncalves**

Capacitive probes analysis (all analysis that we talked about)
            - Soil Moisture and Temperature  
            
            The periods for calculating the accumulated delta are indicated in the spreadsheet (Discharge periods (moisture delta analysis))

Along with the corrections to be made to the discharge periods, is it also possible to perform a statistical difference analysis using only the average of the accumulated delta of horizons 1 and 2? Just like you did for the overall average, but only with depths of 10 and 20 cm?  

# Location SENESTIS


SSC1	#	from up	to
Discharge period

  1	July - 02	July - 08  
	2	July - 09	July - 11  
	3	July - 12	July - 15  
	4	July - 16	July - 17 
	5	July - 19	July - 22 
	6	July - 23	July - 26 
	7	July - 27	July - 28   
	8	July - 29	July - 31  
	9	August - 01	August - 03  
	10	August - 07	August - 09  
	11	August - 10	August - 11  
	12	August - 12	August - 16
	13	August - 17	August - 19  
	14	August - 20	August - 27  
	
	
	
	
July 3 - July 8
July 9 - July 12
July 13 - July 15
delete
OK - do not change
July 24 - July 26
delete
July 30 - July 31
Aug 1 - Aug 4
Aug 5 - Aug 7
delete
Aug 13 - Aug 16
delete
Aug 21 - Aug 27

	

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot



sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, location.x == "SENESTIS")

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_rowwidth= ifelse(system=="DKC5812 Densité tradi - 95 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","DKC5812_40cm",ifelse(system=="DKC5812 FARMER SYSTEM - 85 000 plt/ha - 80 cm","DKC5812_80cm",ifelse(system=="EZ5936XKPZ - Densité 2: 120 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","EZ5936XKPZ_40cm","EZ5936XKPZ_80cm"))))

unique(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1$trait.x)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% unite(hybrid_trait,system, sep="__", remove=F)

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Moisture (%) - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
#dates_1 = c(seq(ymd('2024-07-16'),ymd('2024-07-19'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-21'),ymd('2024-07-23'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-25'),ymd('2024-07-26'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-28'),ymd('2024-07-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-02'),ymd('2024-08-06'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-07'),ymd('2024-08-09'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-10'),ymd('2024-08-11'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-20'),ymd('2024-08-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-04'),ymd('2024-09-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-12'),ymd('2024-09-21'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-26'),ymd('2024-10-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-10-10'),ymd('2024-10-13'),by='days'))

dates_1 = c('2025-07-03','2025-07-08','2025-07-09','2025-07-12','2025-07-13','2025-07-15','2025-07-19','2025-07-22','2025-07-24','2025-07-26','2025-07-30','2025-07-31','2025-08-01','2025-08-04','2025-08-05','2025-08-07','2025-08-13','2025-08-16','2025-08-21','2025-08-27')

dates_1 = ymd(dates_1) 





sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, dat%in% dates_1)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(first_or_last=ifelse(dat %in% ymd(c('2025-07-03','2025-07-09','2025-07-13','2025-07-19','2025-07-24','2025-07-30','2025-08-01','2025-08-05','2025-08-13','2025-08-21')),"first","last"))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Temperature - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)


#ifelse(as.Date(date, "%d/%m/%Y") < as.Date("2001-02-02"), 1, 2)
#data %>% filter(as.Date(date1) %within% interval(start_date, current_date) | as.Date(date2) %within% interval(current_date, end_date) | (is.na(date1) & is.na(date2)))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(date_phases = ifelse(dat >='2025-07-03' & dat <='2025-07-08', "01_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-09' & dat <='2025-07-12', "02_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-13' & dat <='2025-07-15', "03_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-19' & dat <='2025-07-22', "05_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-24' & dat <='2025-07-26', "06_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-30' & dat <='2025-07-31', "08_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-01' & dat <='2025-08-04', "09_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-05' & dat <='2025-08-07', "10_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-13' & dat <='2025-08-16', "12_phase", "13_phase"))))))))))

#DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, filter="top")

#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_spread = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% spread(first_or_last,value_transformed) 
# %>%
#  mutate(rf.diff = rf - first(rf))
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% group_by(system,trait.y,date_phases,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% mutate(delta=round(first(value_transformed)-value_transformed,4))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, first_or_last!="first")


#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, delta>0)

DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, filter="top")


#pdf = df %>% group_by(group) %>% mutate(cs = cumsum(sales))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

#calculate cumulative delta over the different phases (periods)
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% mutate(delta = ifelse(delta <0, 0, delta))

cumulative_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x,trait.x,hybrid_trait) %>% mutate(cumulative_delta = cumsum(delta))

p <- ggplot(cumulative_data, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=cumulative_delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of cumulative delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)
cumulative_1 = p


delta_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x ,system,trait.x,hybrid_trait,hybrid_factor_trait,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% summarise(sum_deltas= sum(delta),mean_deltas= mean(delta))

DT::datatable(delta_data, filter="top")

p=ggplot(delta_data, aes(hybrid_rowwidth,sum_deltas,fill=system))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)

delta_data_1 = filter(delta_data, trait.x!="average_moisture")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(stringr)

###Function which flags plot values with DSR > threshold for DSR traits 
data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location = function(dataset, dsr.threshold){
  outlier.df = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
  #dataset$id = seq(1,dim(dataset)[1],1)
    #print(traits[i])
  ## Subsetting only for the DSR trait
    temp = dataset %>% filter(type == traits[i])
    temp$row_number=rownames(temp)
  ## Subsetting based on missing data
    #temp = temp[temp$MissingDataFlag==FALSE,]
  
  ## Fitting the simple model
     model = lmer(sum_deltas ~ as.factor(system)  + (1|trait.x),data=temp)
  
  
  ## Calculating Studentized residuals, and taking absolute values
    Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(model))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    temp = temp%>% left_join(sr.df)
    #temp = as.data.frame(cbind(temp,Stud.Residual))
    temp$trait = traits[i]
  
  ## Flagging DSR outlier based on threshold
    temp$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag = ifelse(abs(temp$Stud.Residual)>dsr.threshold,TRUE,FALSE)
  
  ## Merging with original dataset
  #temp = temp[,c("id","Stud.Residual","DSR_outlier_flag")]
  #dataset1 = merge(dataset,temp,by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
  #dataset1 = dataset1[,-1]
  outlier.df = rbind(outlier.df,temp)
  }
  return(outlier.df)
}


by_location_analysis = function(data_df_long){
  #traits = unique(data_df_long$trait)
  #data_df_long$rep = as.factor(data_df_long$rep)
traits= unique(data_df_long$type)
 
  analysis_type="Across location"
  means.df = NULL
  anova.df=NULL
  delta_table = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
    #print(traits[i])
    temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    temp = filter(temp, sum_deltas!="NA")
    #print(dim(temp))
    #temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    #temp_wide=temp %>% spread(trait, value)
     # model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ productName+ (1|unique_location_name), data = temp)
 mmod = lmer(sum_deltas ~ as.factor(system)  + (1|trait.x),data=temp)
     
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
      
    #anova_table$Field = NULL
    anv$Trait= traits[i]
     #nova_table$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
     #print(head(anova_table))
      #means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anv)
      #View(anova.df)
 lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~system)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)      #lsm.df = create_TwoFactor_lsmeans_table(model, temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      #
     # lsm.df$Field = NULL
    lsm1.df$Trait= traits[i]
    # lsm.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
      #lsm.df$Field = traits[i]
      #anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm1.df)
      #anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
      #delta.df$Field = NULL
    delta1.df$Trait= traits[i]
    #delta.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
      delta_table = rbind(delta_table,delta1.df)
  }
  
return(list(means.df,anova.df,delta_table))
}
```


## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across all soil depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"

traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("SENESTIS - Comparison of Delta sum across all soil depths")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_1 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across 10 and 20 cm depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data = filter(model_data,trait.x %in% c("soil_mois_1_10","soil_mois_2_20") )
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"
 
traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("SENESTIS - Comparison of Delta sum across 10 and 20 cm depth")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_10_1 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)





#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```

# Location COUSSAN (SSC4)

SSC4	#	from up	to
Discharge periods	
  1	July - 02	July - 06
	2	July - 07	July - 11
	3	July - 12	July - 18
	4	July - 19	July - 24
	5	July - 27	August - 02
	6	August - 05	August - 13
	7	August - 16	August - 18
	8	August - 20	August - 27
	9	August - 29	Sept - 07
	10	Sept - 08	Sept - 09
	
	
OK - do not change
July 8 - July 12
July 13 - July 18
July 20 - July 25
OK - do not change
OK - do not change
Aug 16 - Aug 27

	
	
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot



sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, location.x == "COUSSAN")

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_rowwidth= ifelse(system=="DKC5812 Densité tradi - 95 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","DKC5812_40cm",ifelse(system=="DKC5812 FARMER SYSTEM - 85 000 plt/ha - 80 cm","DKC5812_80cm",ifelse(system=="EZ5936XKPZ - Densité 2: 120 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","EZ5936XKPZ_40cm","EZ5936XKPZ_80cm"))))

unique(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1$trait.x)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% unite(hybrid_trait,system, sep="__", remove=F)

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Moisture (%) - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```


	

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
#dates_1 = c(seq(ymd('2024-07-16'),ymd('2024-07-19'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-21'),ymd('2024-07-23'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-25'),ymd('2024-07-26'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-28'),ymd('2024-07-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-02'),ymd('2024-08-06'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-07'),ymd('2024-08-09'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-10'),ymd('2024-08-11'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-20'),ymd('2024-08-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-04'),ymd('2024-09-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-12'),ymd('2024-09-21'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-26'),ymd('2024-10-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-10-10'),ymd('2024-10-13'),by='days'))

dates_1 = c('2025-07-02','2025-07-06','2025-07-08','2025-07-11','2025-07-13','2025-07-18','2025-07-20','2025-07-25','2025-07-27','2025-08-02','2025-08-05','2025-08-13','2025-08-16','2025-08-27')

dates_1 = ymd(dates_1) 





sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, dat%in% dates_1)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(first_or_last=ifelse(dat %in% ymd(c('2025-07-02','2025-07-08','2025-07-13','2025-07-20','2025-07-27','2025-08-05','2025-08-16')),"first","last"))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Temperature - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)


#ifelse(as.Date(date, "%d/%m/%Y") < as.Date("2001-02-02"), 1, 2)
#data %>% filter(as.Date(date1) %within% interval(start_date, current_date) | as.Date(date2) %within% interval(current_date, end_date) | (is.na(date1) & is.na(date2)))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(date_phases = ifelse(dat >='2025-07-02' & dat <='2025-07-06', "01_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-08' & dat <='2025-07-12', "02_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-13' & dat <='2025-07-18', "03_phase",ifelse(dat >='2024-07-20' & dat <='2024-07-25', "04_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-27' & dat <='2025-08-02', "05_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-05' & dat <='2025-08-13', "06_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-16' & dat <='2025-08-27', "07_phase","11_phase"))))))))

#DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, filter="top")

#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_spread = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% spread(first_or_last,value_transformed) 
# %>%
#  mutate(rf.diff = rf - first(rf))
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% group_by(system,trait.y,date_phases,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% mutate(delta=round(first(value_transformed)-value_transformed,4))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, first_or_last!="first")


#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, delta>0)

DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, filter="top")


#pdf = df %>% group_by(group) %>% mutate(cs = cumsum(sales))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

#calculate cumulative delta over the different phases (periods)
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% mutate(delta = ifelse(delta <0, 0, delta))

cumulative_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x,trait.x,hybrid_trait) %>% mutate(cumulative_delta = cumsum(delta))

p <- ggplot(cumulative_data, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=cumulative_delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of cumulative delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)
cumulative_2 = p


delta_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x ,system,trait.x,hybrid_trait,hybrid_factor_trait,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% summarise(sum_deltas= sum(delta),mean_deltas= mean(delta))

DT::datatable(delta_data, filter="top")

p=ggplot(delta_data, aes(hybrid_rowwidth,sum_deltas,fill=system))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)

delta_data_1 = filter(delta_data, trait.x!="average_moisture")
```



## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across all soil depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"

traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("COUSSAN - Comparison of Delta sum across all soil depths")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_2 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across 10 and 20 cm depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data = filter(model_data,trait.x %in% c("soil_mois_1_10","soil_mois_2_20") )
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"
 
traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("COUSSAN (SSC4) - Comparison of Delta sum across 10 and 20 cm depth")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_10_2 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)





#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


# Location BOUMOURT (SSC5)



	
	
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot



sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, location.x == "BOUMOURT")

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_rowwidth= ifelse(system=="DKC5812 Densité tradi - 95 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","DKC5812_40cm",ifelse(system=="DKC5812 FARMER SYSTEM - 85 000 plt/ha - 80 cm","DKC5812_80cm",ifelse(system=="EZ5936XKPZ - Densité 2: 120 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","EZ5936XKPZ_40cm","EZ5936XKPZ_80cm"))))

unique(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1$trait.x)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% unite(hybrid_trait,system, sep="__", remove=F)

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Moisture (%) - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

from up	to
1	July - 07	July - 16
2	July - 17	July - 22
3	July - 23	July - 31
4	August - 01	August - 09
5	August - 10	August - 19
6	August - 21	August - 25
7	August - 31	Sept - 07
8	Sept - 08	Sept - 19
	

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
#dates_1 = c(seq(ymd('2024-07-16'),ymd('2024-07-19'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-21'),ymd('2024-07-23'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-25'),ymd('2024-07-26'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-28'),ymd('2024-07-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-02'),ymd('2024-08-06'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-07'),ymd('2024-08-09'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-10'),ymd('2024-08-11'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-20'),ymd('2024-08-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-04'),ymd('2024-09-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-12'),ymd('2024-09-21'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-26'),ymd('2024-10-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-10-10'),ymd('2024-10-13'),by='days'))

dates_1 = c('2025-07-05','2025-07-16','2025-07-18','2025-07-22','2025-07-24','2025-07-31','2025-08-02','2025-08-09','2025-08-10','2025-08-19','2025-08-22','2025-08-27','2025-09-01','2025-09-07','2025-09-09','2025-09-20')

dates_1 = ymd(dates_1) 





sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, dat%in% dates_1)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(first_or_last=ifelse(dat %in% ymd(c('2025-07-05','2025-07-18','2025-07-24','2025-08-02','2025-08-10','2025-08-22','2025-09-01','2025-09-09')),"first","last"))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Temperature - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)


#ifelse(as.Date(date, "%d/%m/%Y") < as.Date("2001-02-02"), 1, 2)
#data %>% filter(as.Date(date1) %within% interval(start_date, current_date) | as.Date(date2) %within% interval(current_date, end_date) | (is.na(date1) & is.na(date2)))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(date_phases = ifelse(dat >='2025-07-05' & dat <='2025-07-16', "01_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-18' & dat <='2025-07-22', "02_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-24' & dat <='2025-07-31', "03_phase",ifelse(dat >='2024-08-02' & dat <='2024-08-09', "04_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-10' & dat <='2025-08-19', "05_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-22' & dat <='2025-08-27', "06_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-09-01' & dat <='2025-09-07', "07_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-09-09' & dat <='2025-09-20', "08_phase","09_phase")))))))))

#DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, filter="top")

#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_spread = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% spread(first_or_last,value_transformed) 
# %>%
#  mutate(rf.diff = rf - first(rf))
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% group_by(system,trait.y,date_phases,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% mutate(delta=round(first(value_transformed)-value_transformed,4))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, first_or_last!="first")


#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, delta>0)

DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, filter="top")


#pdf = df %>% group_by(group) %>% mutate(cs = cumsum(sales))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

#calculate cumulative delta over the different phases (periods)
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% mutate(delta = ifelse(delta <0, 0, delta))

cumulative_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x,trait.x,hybrid_trait) %>% mutate(cumulative_delta = cumsum(delta))

p <- ggplot(cumulative_data, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=cumulative_delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of cumulative delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)

cumulative_3 = p

delta_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x ,system,trait.x,hybrid_trait,hybrid_factor_trait,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% summarise(sum_deltas= sum(delta),mean_deltas= mean(delta))

DT::datatable(delta_data, filter="top")

p=ggplot(delta_data, aes(hybrid_rowwidth,sum_deltas,fill=system))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)

delta_data_1 = filter(delta_data, trait.x!="average_moisture")
```



## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across all soil depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"

traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("BOUMOURT - Comparison of Delta sum across all soil depths")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_3 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```

## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across 10 and 20 cm depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data = filter(model_data,trait.x %in% c("soil_mois_1_10","soil_mois_2_20") )
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"
 
traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("BOUMOURT (SSC5) - Comparison of Delta sum across 10 and 20 cm depth")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_10_3 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)





#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


# Location POURSIUGUES (SSC6 100%)



	
	
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot



sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, location.x == "POURSIUGUES (SSC6 100%)")

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_rowwidth= ifelse(system=="DKC5812 Densité tradi - 95 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","DKC5812_40cm",ifelse(system=="DKC5812 FARMER SYSTEM - 85 000 plt/ha - 80 cm","DKC5812_80cm",ifelse(system=="EZ5936XKPZ - Densité 2: 120 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","EZ5936XKPZ_40cm","EZ5936XKPZ_80cm"))))

unique(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1$trait.x)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% unite(hybrid_trait,system, sep="__", remove=F)

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Moisture (%) - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

July - 03	July - 06
July - 07	July - 14
July - 15	July - 22
July - 23	August - 02
August - 03	August - 15
August - 16	August - 19
August - 20	August - 27
August - 28	August - 30
August - 31	Sept - 07
Sept - 08	Sept - 17

	

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
#dates_1 = c(seq(ymd('2024-07-16'),ymd('2024-07-19'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-21'),ymd('2024-07-23'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-25'),ymd('2024-07-26'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-28'),ymd('2024-07-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-02'),ymd('2024-08-06'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-07'),ymd('2024-08-09'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-10'),ymd('2024-08-11'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-20'),ymd('2024-08-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-04'),ymd('2024-09-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-12'),ymd('2024-09-21'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-26'),ymd('2024-10-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-10-10'),ymd('2024-10-13'),by='days'))

dates_1 = c('2025-07-03','2025-07-14','2025-07-16','2025-07-22','2025-07-24','2025-08-02','2025-08-04','2025-08-15','2025-08-21','2025-08-27','2025-09-01','2025-09-08','2025-09-09','2025-09-17')

dates_1 = ymd(dates_1) 





sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, dat%in% dates_1)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(first_or_last=ifelse(dat %in% ymd(c('2025-07-03','2025-07-16','2025-07-24','2025-08-04','2025-08-21','2025-09-01','2025-09-17')),"first","last"))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Temperature - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)


#ifelse(as.Date(date, "%d/%m/%Y") < as.Date("2001-02-02"), 1, 2)
#data %>% filter(as.Date(date1) %within% interval(start_date, current_date) | as.Date(date2) %within% interval(current_date, end_date) | (is.na(date1) & is.na(date2)))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(date_phases = ifelse(dat >='2025-07-03' & dat <='2025-07-14', "01_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-16' & dat <='2025-07-22', "02_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-24' & dat <='2025-08-02', "03_phase",ifelse(dat >='2024-08-04' & dat <='2024-08-15', "04_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-21' & dat <='2025-08-27', "05_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-09-01' & dat <='2025-09-08', "06_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-09-09' & dat <='2025-09-17', "07_phase","11_phase"))))))))

#DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, filter="top")

#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_spread = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% spread(first_or_last,value_transformed) 
# %>%
#  mutate(rf.diff = rf - first(rf))
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% group_by(system,trait.y,date_phases,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% mutate(delta=round(first(value_transformed)-value_transformed,4))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, first_or_last!="first")


#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, delta>0)

DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, filter="top")


#pdf = df %>% group_by(group) %>% mutate(cs = cumsum(sales))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

#calculate cumulative delta over the different phases (periods)
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% mutate(delta = ifelse(delta <0, 0, delta))

cumulative_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x,trait.x,hybrid_trait) %>% mutate(cumulative_delta = cumsum(delta))

p <- ggplot(cumulative_data, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=cumulative_delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of cumulative delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)

cumulative_4 = p



delta_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x ,system,trait.x,hybrid_trait,hybrid_factor_trait,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% summarise(sum_deltas= sum(delta),mean_deltas= mean(delta))

DT::datatable(delta_data, filter="top")

p=ggplot(delta_data, aes(hybrid_rowwidth,sum_deltas,fill=system))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)

delta_data_1 = filter(delta_data, trait.x!="average_moisture")
```



## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across all soil depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"

traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("POURSIUGUES (SSC6 100%) - Comparison of Delta sum across all soil depths")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_4 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across 10 and 20 cm depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data = filter(model_data,trait.x %in% c("soil_mois_1_10","soil_mois_2_20") )
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"
 
traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("POURSIUGUES (SSC6 100%) - Comparison of Delta sum across 10 and 20 cm depth")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_10_4 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)





#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```

# Location POURSIUGUES (SSC7 75%)



	
	
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=15, fig.width=15}
#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot



sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot, location.x == "POURSIUGUES (SSC7 75%)")

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_rowwidth= ifelse(system=="DKC5812 Densité tradi - 95 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","DKC5812_40cm",ifelse(system=="DKC5812 FARMER SYSTEM - 85 000 plt/ha - 80 cm","DKC5812_80cm",ifelse(system=="EZ5936XKPZ - Densité 2: 120 000 plt/ha - 40 cm","EZ5936XKPZ_40cm","EZ5936XKPZ_80cm"))))

unique(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1$trait.x)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1 %>% unite(hybrid_trait,system, sep="__", remove=F)

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Moisture (%) - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

July - 03	July - 06
July - 07	July - 11
July - 12	July - 22
July - 23	August - 09
August - 10	August - 18
August - 20	August - 27
August - 29	August - 30
August - 31	Sept - 03
Sept - 04	Sept - 07
Sept - 08	Sept - 09
Sept - 10	Sept - 17


	

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
#dates_1 = c(seq(ymd('2024-07-16'),ymd('2024-07-19'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-21'),ymd('2024-07-23'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-25'),ymd('2024-07-26'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-07-28'),ymd('2024-07-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-02'),ymd('2024-08-06'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-07'),ymd('2024-08-09'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-10'),ymd('2024-08-11'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-08-20'),ymd('2024-08-29'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-04'),ymd('2024-09-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-12'),ymd('2024-09-21'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-09-26'),ymd('2024-10-05'),by='days'),seq(ymd('2024-10-10'),ymd('2024-10-13'),by='days'))

dates_1 = c('2025-07-03','2025-07-06','2025-07-08','2025-07-11','2025-07-13','2025-07-22','2025-07-24','2025-08-09','2025-08-11','2025-08-19','2025-08-21','2025-08-27','2025-09-01','2025-09-08','2025-09-09','2025-09-17')

dates_1 = ymd(dates_1) 





sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1, dat%in% dates_1)

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(first_or_last=ifelse(dat %in% ymd(c('2025-07-03','2025-07-08','2025-07-13','2025-07-24','2025-08-11','2025-08-21','2025-09-01','2025-09-09')),"first","last"))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=value_transformed, color=hybrid_trait,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_point() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Soil Temperature - Using the Coefficient method")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)


#ifelse(as.Date(date, "%d/%m/%Y") < as.Date("2001-02-02"), 1, 2)
#data %>% filter(as.Date(date1) %within% interval(start_date, current_date) | as.Date(date2) %within% interval(current_date, end_date) | (is.na(date1) & is.na(date2)))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% mutate(date_phases = ifelse(dat >='2025-07-03' & dat <='2025-07-06', "01_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-08' & dat <='2025-07-11', "02_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-07-13' & dat <='2025-07-22', "03_phase",ifelse(dat >='2024-07-24' & dat <='2024-08-09', "04_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-11' & dat <='2025-08-19', "05_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-08-21' & dat <='2025-08-27', "06_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-09-01' & dat <='2025-09-08', "07_phase",ifelse(dat >='2025-09-09' & dat <='2025-09-17', "08_phase","12_phase")))))))))

#DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates, filter="top")

#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_spread = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% spread(first_or_last,value_transformed) 
# %>%
#  mutate(rf.diff = rf - first(rf))
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates %>% group_by(system,trait.y,date_phases,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% mutate(delta=round(first(value_transformed)-value_transformed,4))

sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, first_or_last!="first")


#sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary, delta>0)

DT::datatable(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, filter="top")


#pdf = df %>% group_by(group) %>% mutate(cs = cumsum(sales))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x,scales="free_y")
plotly::ggplotly(p)

#calculate cumulative delta over the different phases (periods)
sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% mutate(delta = ifelse(delta <0, 0, delta))

cumulative_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x,trait.x,hybrid_trait) %>% mutate(cumulative_delta = cumsum(delta))

p <- ggplot(cumulative_data, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=cumulative_delta, color=system,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line()+geom_point()+
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Dynamics of cumulative delta across the season")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)

cumulative_5 = p



delta_data = sondes_data_2_gather_summary_1_plot_1_dates_summary_1 %>% group_by(location.x ,system,trait.x,hybrid_trait,hybrid_factor_trait,hybrid_rowwidth) %>% summarise(sum_deltas= sum(delta),mean_deltas= mean(delta))

DT::datatable(delta_data, filter="top")

p=ggplot(delta_data, aes(hybrid_rowwidth,sum_deltas,fill=system))+geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge")+facet_grid(trait.x~location.x)
plotly::ggplotly(p)

delta_data_1 = filter(delta_data, trait.x!="average_moisture")
```



## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across all soil depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"

traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))
```
