```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}
library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("POURSIUGUES (SSC7 75%) - Comparison of Delta sum across all soil depths")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_5 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


## Statistical analysis - Comparison of delta sums across 10 and 20 cm depths between the different hybrid systems.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data= delta_data_1
model_data = filter(model_data,trait.x %in% c("soil_mois_1_10","soil_mois_2_20") )
model_data$type = "soil_moisture_percent"
 
traits = unique(model_data$type)
model_data$sum_deltas = as.double(model_data$sum_deltas )

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.width=14}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 
ssc_data_1 = ssc_data


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$system = as.factor(ssc_data$system)

ssc_data$trait.x  = as.factor(ssc_data$trait.x  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( system,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(system)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = system), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Delta sum")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = -5, group = system), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+ggtitle("POURSIUGUES (SSC6 75%) - Comparison of Delta sum across 10 and 20 cm depth")
plot_lsmeans

plot_lsmeans_10_5 = plot_lsmeans


#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)





#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```

# Accumulated delta sum - All locations

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=10, fig.width=12}

plotly::ggplotly(cumulative_1)


plotly::ggplotly(cumulative_2)


plotly::ggplotly(cumulative_3)

plotly::ggplotly(cumulative_4)

plotly::ggplotly(cumulative_5)
```



# Statistical analysis results - All locations across all soil depths

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
plot_lsmeans_1

plot_lsmeans_2


plot_lsmeans_3

plot_lsmeans_4

plot_lsmeans_5
```


# Statistical analysis results - All locations across 10 and 20cm soil depths

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
plot_lsmeans_10_1

plot_lsmeans_10_2


plot_lsmeans_10_3

plot_lsmeans_10_4

plot_lsmeans_10_5
```
